Package org.eventb.core.tests

Class BuilderTest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractProofTests, AutoCompletionTests, AutoPOMTest, AutoProverDeltaTests, BasicTest, ComponentClauseTests, EventBIndexerTests, EventBTest, EventBVersionTest, POLoaderTest, ProofSerializationTests, ProofSimplifierTests, PSUpdateTests, RelationsTests, ReplayTests, TacticsPreferencesTest
public abstract class BuilderTest extends Object
Abstract class for builder tests.

    • cleanupWorkspace

      private void cleanupWorkspace() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Deletes all resources, markers, etc from the workspace. We need to first remove all read-only attributes on resources to ensure that they get properly deleted.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
